description: Interactive poll asking followers to choose their preferred beverage preparation style or variant, framed as a fun 'how do you like it?' question with emoji-enhanced multiple choice options.
structural_recipe: Post a beverage product image or brand mention. Use Arabic caption starting with 'كيف تحبها؟' (How do you like it?). Present 3-4 distinct beverage preferences as emoji-tagged options (e.g., cold/refreshing ❄️, fruity variant 🍓, hot/warming ☕🔥). End with branded hashtags and location/brand tags. Encourage voting via comments or story polls.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences engage strongly with personalized preference questions that invite self-expression and social comparison. Beverage choices are culturally significant and emotionally resonant, especially seasonal variants. The emoji-visual format reduces friction for response and creates playful engagement. Brand tagging builds community identity around product preferences.
transplantation_caveats: Alcohol-related beverages must be avoided entirely in Saudi market
Ensure all beverage options align with Islamic dietary guidelines and local consumption norms
Temperature/seasonal preferences may vary regionally; test locally before broad rollout
Some audiences may prefer poll features over comment-based voting for privacy
cultural_constraints: Halal certification implicit expectation for F&B brands
Respect fasting hours during Ramadan in beverage messaging
Avoid imagery or messaging conflicting with Islamic values
